column1: Hey Brynn, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you! which destination were you lookin to book
Punta Cana prob at one of the Occidental's???
yea for sure Occidental Punta Cana is where I'll be!
its pretty gas. how many ppl in your group so far?
bet thats solid. perfect for a room
We go to u of South Carolina
I think a lot of people from here are going to punta
yeaa we got a lot of ppl from your school for sure. gonna be lit lol
Im gonna put together the details now, were you lookin to get started today?
Yesss as soon as possible would be great
yea lets do it! ill add a discount for you too since youre getting in today
cool if I send the info through email? its a little long for text
Oh wait sorry my email is brynnpickavance@gmail.com
all good! ill send that rn
just sent that over lmk if it came through! I can hook it up with a discount on the prices you see there too

ill personally be at the Occidental Punta Cana, would be dope to have you there with us. thats where our other USC groups will be too. some did the 8th to 12th, I sent the 7th-12th but we can always do the 8th
Just trying to figure out so I can tell the others !

Ok perfect so what would the price be per person? I see it's 646 for the room at occidental Punta Cana, and then add the party pass so $846 per person right?? Does that include discount or is that separate from it
all good! so I can do $599 + the 200 party pass bundle wll be $799 per person
lmk when you tell the others and if they have any questions. ill start the reservation in a few
Got it I will let them know
Do you recommend getting there Sunday or Saturday??
hmmm personally, I would base it off of the cheapest flight you can find
ill help you find one, where would you ant to fly out of?
I think we'll plan for 7-11 bc the flights are less to come on Saturday
I found some for southwest and jet blue coming to/from Orlando so those are figured out
Also I let everyone else know and they are good with it!
okay cool lets run it! ill send over the reservation in a few mins
just sent that over! through email. ill send it here too
hey saw some people have been getting slotted in! lmk if anyone has any questions I got you
Ok thank you! I think 2 more are about to pay and then just waiting on the last
dopeee. yea just lmk if anything
Oh wait just double checking booze cruise included bc on the email it says it is but then in the portal it just says discounted
yea yup, just says discounted because it was included in the deal for booking today
Yea def lookin forward to meeting y'all
Hi spiffy! I was just wondering if there's any themed nights for when we go out to a certain club. Like a white night or something like that???
as of now there arent any specific attire themes for the club nights, if you're like planning your fits
can plan for a night out

Ok sounds good! Also idk if you got my email but the website wasn't letting me put my flight info to the reservation. I tried it a few different times and it wouldn't either log me in or it wouldn't let me save the flight info. Is there any way I can just send it to you so you could put in on your end?
whats your flight info? and did you have troubles logging in every time?
Ok so it's Southwest WN782 MCO-PUJ Departs at 10:05 am, arrives at 1:45 PM And then coming back PUJ-MCO Departs at 1:25 pm, arrives at 4:30 pm
It just wouldn't let me log in if it was coming from the blue tours email
But then I went back into our emails to access the reservation and got in and everything and it let me put my flight info in there but then wouldn't save it. Like it would come up as an error
Also all 4 of us are gonna be on that flight
the log in stuff. def want to make sure you're able to log in smoothly
Ill get this added in for you
hey whats the confirmation code for the flight
Hi! I was wondering if u guys sell the club passes onsite. My friends are going to the same hotel for same days but didn't plan through a group
yea I can also set them up with a party pass only reservation if they wanna grab it now
Ok perf how much is it?
Coco Bongo: $79 Imagine: $89 Maroca: $69 Booze Cruise: $79
Coco Bongo: $79 Imagine: $89 Maroca: $69 Booze Cruise: $79
Coco Bongo is $79 Imagine is $89 Maroca is $69 Booze Cruise is $79
Also was wondering do u guys do transportation from the hotel to clubs?
yea that comes with the party pass
Liked “yea that comes with the party pass”
Hi sorry another question but is there a dress code or anything for the clubs? Especially shoe wise
not like a strict upscale dress code anywhere, nah
typical night out at the club vibe
yo! safe travels today, see y'all out here soon
Hey we're a little lost trying to find the ride at the airport, is there a certain area to go?
Hi we're at coco bongo and was wondering if we could get an earlier ride instead of waiting for the bus??
We haven't seen any go blue ppl around the outside
Hey. The buses will leave as they start to fill up
If you want to arrange your own ride back you def can
There should be a Go Blue staff member in the lobby area
